events.title: Tokyo weekend rain forecast
events.description: Sample offline market about whether measurable rain will be recorded in Tokyo this weekend.

markets.question: Will measurable rain be recorded in Tokyo this weekend?
markets.description: Resolves using a public weather observation sample rule.

events.title: Sample championship outcome
